premise: A terraform engineer on humanity's first Mars colony discovers that the atmospheric processors are working too well — oxygen levels are rising faster than the models predict. Something in the Martian soil is responding to the terraforming, and it's not geological.

characters.name: Santos Medina
characters.description: Terraform engineer, early 40s. Third-generation space worker — grandparents built orbital habitats. Quiet, data-driven, uncomfortable with ambiguity. Married to the colony's chief botanist, which complicates things when the biology team wants to keep the anomaly quiet.

characters.name: Dr. Priya Chandrasekaran
characters.description: Colony xenobiologist. Was brought along as a formality — nobody expected to find anything alive. Now she's the most important person on Mars and the least prepared for it. Brilliant, scattered, records everything in voice memos she forgets to label.

characters.name: Administrator Wolfe
characters.description: Colony administrator appointed by the funding consortium. Former corporate restructuring specialist. The colony's survival depends on meeting terraform milestones. If the anomaly delays the timeline, funding gets pulled and everyone goes home — or worse, doesn't.
